steps.title: Track the trade-off
steps.content: The passage says participants did not ignore the doctors' credentials; instead, those credentials were outweighed by the experiential relevance of former trial volunteers. The blank must explain why direct experience mattered more for credibility.

steps.title: Reject shifts
steps.content: A turns the issue into skepticism of expertise. C focuses on participants' ability to evaluate messages. D introduces positive message tone, which the passage never mentions. The remaining choice states that volunteers shared the contemplated experience while doctors did not. The answer is B.
